data.content:
Plan review approval, 2026-04-28

Approved for implementation. The plan is complete enough for this pass: it preserves the existing human-owned Escalations BeatTable, adds an Approvals tab, reuses existing approval extraction, adds structured logging, and covers lower-right toast, global banner, and inbox/bell navigation with duplicate suppression.

Implementation constraints:
- Do not invent fake approve/deny mechanics. If no adapter response path exists, render and log an explicit manual/unsupported state.
- Keep notification store changes backward compatible with existing beat-focused notifications.
- Use tab-specific counts/copy so human-owned beats and approval requests do not become misleadingly combined.
- Keep approval parsing isolated so a future server-side durable approval index can replace the initial live-event source.

Test strategy is sufficient: helper/store unit tests, session connection notification tests, header/banner/bell navigation tests, and FinalCut tab regression tests.
